top_signals.title: G7 leaders express optimism for peace after Trump’s ‘very good’ Zelenskyy meeting
top_signals.summary: After the group meeting with ​Trump, Zelenskyy said that G7 leaders agreed that Russia was ⁠not winning the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: General Atomics awarded US Army contract for extended-range artillery round
top_signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
